prediction.reasoning: For a 1-day prediction of AMD stock, I used a random walk model with historical volatility. AMD typically exhibits daily volatility around 2-3%. The point estimate assumes no directional bias over such a short timeframe. Confidence intervals are based on normal distribution assumptions with estimated daily standard deviation of approximately 2.5%, widening appropriately for higher confidence levels.
